constraints: Must be able to see target.
Target must have 100 HP or fewer.
mechanics.power_level_justification: Level 9 designation is justified by the potential for instant, unavoidable death against appropriate targets.

analysis.archivist_notes: A cornerstone high-level spell. Mechanics are clear: 'If the creature has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies.' This avoids ambiguity present in some older instant-death effects.
